name: Marketplace Package Detail (not-found)
description: Marketplace package detail page in its resolved not-found state (/marketplace/[slug]). Without a routeStub the sentinel slug 404s and the page renders PackageNotFound: 'Package not found' heading plus 'Back to Marketplace' button. The stubbed populated variant is deferred — the current stub shape crashes the page (missing required fields for transformBackendDetailToFrontend). The not-found state mirrors demo-detail's pattern: a dynamic route with a fixed sentinel that 404s to a deterministic view. Ports marketplace.spec.ts invalid slug test. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Package not found
states.description: The PackageNotFound component rendered when the sentinel slug returns 404. CI element dump confirmed only button-back-to-marketplace is registered (the heading is not picked up by the SDK).

assertions.description: 'Back to Marketplace' button — the only SDK-registered element on the not-found view.
